about.pageDescription: Learn about the mission, vision, and team behind the APAC Precision Health Initiative
about.heroSubtitle: Connecting Asia-Pacific to build an open, interoperable, patient-centered digital health ecosystem

founder.name: Yongjun Zhao
founder.title: Founder
founder.quote: Connecting China's medical resources with the world through technological innovation — truly fulfilling our mission of 'Medicine Without Borders.'

techFoundation.heading: Technological Foundation & Innovation
techFoundation.text: As an AI medical technology company driven by innovation at its core, we have built formidable expertise through years of deep commitment in two key domains: pharmaceutical R&D and medical imaging. In pharmaceuticals, we have accumulated extensive pharmaceutical intermediate reserves and proprietary research breakthroughs. In 2026, we are systematically initiating national patent applications to protect our core intellectual property, while advancing 'drug repurposing' research to uncover new indications and applications for existing compounds. In medical imaging, our self-developed AI-assisted diagnostic software delivers high-precision, intelligent image analysis, with NMPA certification underway in 2026 to ensure regulatory-compliant clinical deployment.

strategy.heading: Strategic Partnerships & Commercialization
strategy.text: We pursue a dual-engine strategy of domestic synergy and international collaboration. Domestically, we are integrating with China General Technology Group's cloud-based medical imaging platform and partnering with China National United Corporation and Sinopharm Group to build a digital pharmaceutical wholesale and retail platform, driving intelligent, refined management of drug distribution. Internationally, we are actively advancing partnerships with global healthcare leaders such as Siemens, continuously expanding our global market presence.

overseas.heading: Overseas Practice & Dual-Standard Data Architecture
overseas.text: In overseas markets, we have pioneered the deployment of AI-assisted medical imaging diagnostic services in underserved regions such as Timor-Leste, innovatively introducing a 'FHIR + GB/T' dual-standard data architecture that ensures compatibility between international standards (FHIR) and Chinese national standards (GB/T). This architecture not only elevates local diagnostic capabilities but also builds a bridge for cross-border medical data exchange, enabling seamless patient referrals across countries.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: As global demand for cross-border healthcare continues to grow, we are forging our dual-standard data architecture into a core competitive advantage — positioning ourselves as the nexus connecting China's medical resources with the world, and truly fulfilling our mission of 'Medicine Without Borders.'

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.mission: To drive widespread adoption of SMART on FHIR open healthcare standards across Asia-Pacific, breaking down data silos and empowering precision medicine innovation.
mission.vision: By 2030, every patient in Asia-Pacific will benefit from seamless health data interoperability — receiving more precise, efficient, and equitable healthcare.

values.title: Core Values
values.value1Desc: Committed to open, transparent technology standards. No data lock-in. Promoting fair industry competition.
values.value2Desc: Building cross-border cooperation platforms to share best practices and tackle APAC healthcare challenges together.
values.value3Desc: Every technology decision is guided by the ultimate goal of improving patient experience and health outcomes.
